project.name: discreet-dynasties
project.description: Wealth preservation and dynasty planning content site with membership tiers, AI advisors, FATE assessment, community features, automated content generation pipeline, and multi-platform social dispatch.

nodes.name: route.ts
nodes.summary: Cron route for automated content generation. Calls lib/content-pipeline generateAndPublish() to create Hall posts or email dispatches from DD book chapters, with kill switch, CronLog tracking, and owner notification.

nodes.name: GET
nodes.summary: GET handler for content-gen cron. Auth via verifyCronAuth, kill switch via CONTENT_GEN_ENABLED, delegates to generateAndPublish() then notifyOwner().

nodes.name: route.ts
nodes.summary: Evergreen cron route: extracts quotable passages from dispatches using multi-model rotation, generates social copy, dispatches to platforms with image picking, dedup via passage hash, cursor-based cycling through all published dispatches.

nodes.name: GET
nodes.summary: GET handler for evergreen cron. Uses lib/evergreen for cursor management, chunk reading, passage extraction, social copy generation, dedup. Dispatches via lib/social with image picking.

nodes.name: route.ts
nodes.summary: Social dispatch cron: handles scheduled posts, generates social copy for new dispatches (Claude + optional Grok wit refinement for X), picks images, dispatches to Facebook/Instagram/X, posts AI-generated first-comments, detects story arcs, fetches platform metrics for analytics.

nodes.name: GET
nodes.summary: GET handler for social cron. 4-phase: (1) dispatch scheduled posts, (2) generate+post social for new dispatches with first-comments, (3) story-arc detection, (4) metrics collection.

nodes.name: route.ts
nodes.summary: Stripe webhook handler. Follows 200-only pattern (always returns 200 to prevent webhook suspension). Handles checkout.session.completed (role upgrade) and customer.subscription.deleted (reset to free).

nodes.name: POST
nodes.summary: POST handler for Stripe webhook. Verifies signature, processes checkout and subscription events, always returns 200.

nodes.name: content-pipeline.ts
nodes.summary: Automated content generation pipeline for DD. Alternates between Hall posts and email dispatches using DDBookContent chapters. Rotates through Claude/GPT-4o/Grok models. Creates Dispatch records (feeds social cron), DDHallPost records, and sends email via Resend. Includes owner notification.

nodes.name: generateAndPublish
nodes.summary: Main content generation function. Reads DD book chapters via Prisma, alternates hall_post/email_dispatch types, generates via multi-model rotation, creates Dispatch + DDHallPost or sends email, advances cursor.

nodes.name: notifyOwner
nodes.summary: Sends FYI notification to owner via Resend after content auto-publishes.

nodes.name: evergreen.ts
nodes.summary: Evergreen social engine. Manages cursor-based cycling through all published Dispatches, extracting quotable passages via AI (multi-model rotation), generating platform-native social copy, dedup via SHA-256 passage hash, and cadence control (launch mode vs cruise mode).

nodes.name: getOrCreateCursor
nodes.summary: Gets or creates EvergreenCursor. Seeds from oldest published Dispatch.

nodes.name: getNextChunk
nodes.summary: Returns next 25-line chunk from current dispatch. Handles post exhaustion, cursor advancement, and cycle wrapping.

nodes.name: extractPassage
nodes.summary: Extracts the most quotable passage (50-300 words) from a dispatch chunk using AI. Returns NO_QUOTABLE_PASSAGE for non-quotable sections.

nodes.name: generateSocialCopy
nodes.summary: Generates platform-native social posts (Facebook no-link, X Premium+, Instagram with hashtags) from an extracted passage.

nodes.name: computePassageHash
nodes.summary: SHA-256 hash of normalized passage for dedup.

nodes.name: isDuplicate
nodes.summary: Checks EvergreenQuote table for existing passage hash.

nodes.name: shouldRunNow
nodes.summary: Cadence control: launch mode (first 14 days, both slots) vs cruise mode (morning only).

nodes.name: advanceCursor
nodes.summary: Advances EvergreenCursor line position and model index.

nodes.name: facebook.ts
nodes.summary: Facebook Graph API integration. Posts to page feed with URL stripping (throttle prevention), collaborator page tagging (with retry fallback), and first-comment support. Includes isFacebookEnabled check.

nodes.name: postToFacebook
nodes.summary: Posts to Facebook Page feed via Graph API. Strips URLs, adds collaborator tag, retries without tag on failure.

nodes.name: commentOnFacebook
nodes.summary: Posts a comment on a Facebook post (used for first-comment pattern with article link).

nodes.name: isFacebookEnabled
nodes.summary: Checks META_PAGE_ID and META_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN are set.

nodes.name: image-picker.ts
nodes.summary: Theme-aware image picker for social posts. Matches content against keyword themes (dynasty, fate), queries ImagePool for tagged images with least-recently-used ordering, falls back to any site/shared image.

nodes.name: pickImage
nodes.summary: Picks a themed image from ImagePool based on content keyword matching, using LRU ordering to rotate images.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Social dispatch orchestrator. Dispatches content to Facebook (text only, no links), Instagram (requires image), and X. Includes first-comment system: AI generates a brief reply with article link, posted as a reply on Facebook and X.

nodes.name: dispatchToAll
nodes.summary: Dispatches content to all enabled platforms (Facebook, Instagram with image, X). Returns per-platform results with status and platformId.

nodes.name: postFirstComments
nodes.summary: Posts AI-generated first-comments on successfully dispatched social posts. Uses Claude to generate a brief reflective reply with article link. Supports Facebook (commentOnFacebook) and X (replyOnX).

nodes.name: x.ts
nodes.summary: X/Twitter integration via twitter-api-v2. Posts tweets, replies to tweets (for first-comment pattern), and checks enabled status.

nodes.name: postToX
nodes.summary: Posts a tweet via Twitter API v2.

nodes.name: replyOnX
nodes.summary: Replies to a tweet (used for first-comment pattern with article link).

nodes.name: isXEnabled
nodes.summary: Checks TWITTER_ENABLED flag and all 4 API credentials.

layers.name: Pages & UI Components
layers.description: Next.js pages, layouts, and client components for the DD member experience

layers.name: API Routes
layers.description: REST API endpoints for user actions, admin, billing, AI companion, and webhook handling

layers.name: App Shell & Auth
layers.description: Root layout, NextAuth configuration, and middleware for session-based route protection

layers.name: Shared Components
layers.description: Layout components shared across all pages: navigation, footer, providers, theme toggle

layers.name: Domain Logic & Services
layers.description: Business logic, AI integration, social dispatch, content pipeline, evergreen engine, and database access

tour.title: Entry Point: Root Layout & Auth Config
tour.description: The app shell starts at app/layout.tsx which imports Providers (SessionProvider + ThemeProvider), Navigation, Footer, and JSON-LD structured data. auth.ts configures NextAuth with Prisma adapter, Resend email, and GitHub providers.

tour.title: Database & Configuration Layer
tour.description: lib/db.ts creates a singleton Prisma client over Neon Postgres. lib/config.ts exports site URLs. lib/stripe.ts manages Stripe integration with price IDs, customer creation, and role mapping for the tiered membership model.

tour.title: AI Multi-Model Engine
tour.description: lib/ai-models.ts abstracts Claude, GPT-4o, and Grok behind a unified callModel interface with model rotation. lib/ai/prompts.ts defines the DD system identity, archetypes, and advisor personas. lib/ai/rag.ts enables RAG search over book content using OpenAI embeddings.

tour.title: Content Generation Pipeline
tour.description: lib/content-pipeline.ts auto-generates Hall posts and email dispatches from DDBookContent chapters, alternating content types and rotating models. The content-gen cron triggers daily, creates Dispatch records, publishes to The Hall, sends Resend emails, and notifies the owner.

tour.title: Social Dispatch System
tour.description: lib/social/ implements a multi-platform dispatcher: index.ts orchestrates Facebook (no-link, collaborator tagging), Instagram (image-required), and X (Premium+ long-form). First-comment pattern posts AI-generated replies with article links. image-picker.ts matches themed images from ImagePool.

tour.title: Evergreen Recycling Engine
tour.description: lib/evergreen.ts cycles through all published Dispatches, extracting quotable passages via AI, generating social copy, deduplicating via SHA-256 hash, and dispatching to platforms. Uses EvergreenCursor for position tracking and cadence control (launch mode vs cruise mode).

tour.title: FATE Assessment & Pathways
tour.description: lib/dd/fate.ts implements the FATE audit (Food, Assurance, Tools & Skills, Energy domains). lib/dd/pathways.ts defines structured weekly learning pathways. These feed the Forge dashboard where users track progress toward dynasty-building milestones.

tour.title: Community & Admin
tour.description: The Hall is a member forum with posts, comments, and likes. The Vow system lets members take formal commitments. Admin dashboard manages users, email blasts, gifts, and the Armory. Stripe webhook (200-only pattern) handles subscription lifecycle.
